description_long: This object is a pumpkin with a carved skull face on one side, featuring angular eye sockets and a nasal cavity, giving it a Halloween-themed appearance. The pumpkin is round with a slightly flattened base and a prominent green stem at the top. The surface is matte and textured with subtle vertical ridges typical of a pumpkin, and the color is a natural orange with some shading. The carved face exposes the hollow interior, suggesting the pumpkin has been emptied. The back and sides are uncarved, maintaining the pumpkin's natural form. The overall look combines the organic qualities of a pumpkin with the stylized, geometric features of a skull.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a green stem, carved with a stylized skull face on one side and a matte, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved skull face with angular eye sockets and nasal cavity, and the green stem visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the uncarved pumpkin surface and the edge of the skull face cutout, with the green stem centered.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the green stem and the pumpkin's round, ribbed surface with no visible carving.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the uncarved pumpkin surface and the edge of the skull face cutout, with the green stem visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional Halloween-style carving with a geometric skull face motif, featuring angular eye sockets and a nasal cavity cutout. The rest of the pumpkin remains uncarved.
